textByHash.85f1681ac2df5fe55ebd635cdc1500588a92fc7a: Oh I wish this broken cart was my only problem... I've got to find my family...
textByHash.f7311ff2281b943108553ad980478b058cc32e2b: I'm Lady Servil, my husband is Sir Servil. We were travelling north together with our son Sammy when we were ambushed by General Khazard's men.
textByHash.8f92af986c3b097a6bb6090361e447bd035bc775: He's been after me ever since I declined his hand in marriage.
textByHash.1d3ab35a1ca4374ebb218a60bd588d355cadd058: Now he's kidnapped my husband and son to fight in his battle arena to the south of here. I hate to think what he'll do to them. He's a sick and twisted man.
textByHash.4f5a61a37859379e0d01ac7921f2b20719a87cf7: Please do. My family is wealthy and can reward you handsomely. I'll be waiting here for you.
textByHash.b8ecf8b8d4589b8f0ed17587fa8a2fca47c4b589: Brave traveller, please... bring back my family.
textByHash.13d9aff971b0d6fcad1bbacebca14b0ca30e5f17: Have you had any luck with freeing my family?
textByHash.e00e086c69f6de951358d38405a4cf78dede8245: Oh no, they won't stand a chance. Please go back and help.
textByHash.05a4dfc6ca652cd7b75628ec62cf6769d996c052: You're alive, I thought Khazard's men had taken you.
textByHash.1f89f6551f087f659b8485a9a9d2507bcfc37be4: My son and husband are safe and recovering at home. Without you they would certainly be dead. I am truly grateful for your service.
textByHash.805ef04f642df79c54ab58eec48d2ea3dda94a29: All I can offer in return is material wealth. Please take these coins as a sign of my gratitude.
textByHash.2f1440f47a2cb84c0dd9af8f9a1278483941847e: Oh hello my dear. My husband and son are resting while I wait for the cart fixer.
textByHash.20064872cbc1919dfe66486781af9e427ddd0906: The cart? That's the least of my problems. I've got to find my family...
textByHash.0ee1e12a8c9a5ffbc6887eea0690bcdc4774d2bc: Well, I'm Lady Servil. I was travelling to Ardougne with my husband, Justin, and son, Sammy, when our cart broke on some rocks.
textByHash.b24c3030b85e8231a8a0668d215fda423cb95533: Some of General Khazard's men spotted us and offered to help, but they demanded my husband and son fight in their arena first! We said no, but they took them anyway!
textByHash.0f418b895a34da09d536fa1226da285d50f0a4ca: He's a menace! This entire area is under the control of him and his mercenary group, the Khazard Army. They prey on the weak and vulnerable, making them fight in that arena of theirs, all for entertainment!
textByHash.e82e20322d4051cab69294959952ad409740d9c0: The authorities don't care. Khazard's men just pay them off if they ever come to investigate.
textByHash.37fb184b40d7440ebdda801ccf9b4e2cb28846d9: Thank you. They'll be somewhere inside the arena. I'll be waiting here for you.
textByHash.70a435e182e8bab8140599105b52694586210cc9: Adventurer, please... bring back my family. They'll be somewhere inside the arena.
textByHash.8c2efddfd9600d5b48ad2fc5e410c9f7b2808417: No! Please, you have to help them!
textByHash.75a349c5eb29bae0e03ba2b0ebfdd3d0954a2c34: You're alive! I feared General Khazard would have killed you!
textByHash.8b7c83119892973e10eb3d3e8454e769e3dd48f3: Thank goodness. I'd have never forgiven myself if you'd have died saving my family.
textByHash.99a514ac96caf1cbb0164f75f366fe3c6542f906: Now, you'll be pleased to know that my son and husband are safe and recovering at home. Without you they would certainly be dead. Thank you, for everything.
textByHash.5e58463599cd698d0924ef4bf5e62770458b9765: Please, take this payment. It's the least you deserve.
textByHash.ddeb7d25aa61b796b82b9ce4f8ea5de2250dd914: Hello there. My husband and son are resting while I wait for the cart fixer.
textByHash.0fc245678e20085038823381766e9c218acb17e0: I'm sure it won't. Thanks again for everything.
